description: Semafor is a global news platform launched in October 2022 by former BuzzFeed News editor-in-chief Ben Smith and former Bloomberg Media CEO Justin B. Smith. In September 2023, Semafor journalist Jay Solomon published a landmark investigation, jointly with [Iran International](/orgs/iran-international), that revealed the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023) — a covert Iranian [Foreign Ministry](/orgs/ministry-of-foreign-affairs) influence operation in which Western-based academics were recruited to promote Tehran's nuclear negotiating positions in Western media and policy circles.
editorial_notes: Included because it co-published the IEI leak investigation. Not an Iran-focused outlet.
